response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, including C/C++ (notably at National Instruments and some embedded work). However, his recent roles focus heavily on Node.js, TypeScript, and other high-level languages, with limited exposure to C++ in the last 5+ years. His expertise in industrial automation, IEC standards, or cloud platforms (e.g., Azure) is unclear, and his security practices (IEC 62443) are not prominently highlighted.
strengths: Strong C/C++ background with experience in low-latency systems (e.g., at Dunnhumby and National Instruments).
Proven ability to architect scalable, event-driven platforms (e.g., GISCollective, voice apps).
Demonstrated expertise in test-driven development (TDD) and agile practices (e.g., Refactoring Dojos, CI/CD).
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems (last notable C++ work was in 2015).
No explicit mention of IEC 62443, secure development lifecycle (SDL), or industrial cybersecurity standards.
Lacks cloud platform (e.g., Azure) and industrial protocol (Modbus, OPC UA) experience required for the role.
